vat.title: Forecast: VAT registration
vat.intro: The company is not registered for VAT. The threshold for mandatory registration is {threshold} (≈ {thresholdBgn} BGN) of taxable turnover for the calendar year {year}, tracked daily (art. 168c of the VAT Act).
vat.reached: The year's turnover already exceeds the threshold — a VAT registration obligation arises (application within 7 days of exceeding it).
vat.noData: Not enough data for a forecast (enter monthly revenue or issue invoices).
vat.notReachedByYear: At the current pace the threshold most likely will NOT be reached by the end of {year} (turnover resets on 1 January).
vat.expectedAround: At the current pace the threshold is expected to be reached around {date}. An application is then filed within 7 days.
vat.note: The forecast is indicative, based on the year's revenue and the expected pace. Turnover under art. 168c also includes certain ancillary supplies — for an accurate assessment consult an accountant.

price.title: Simulation: price change (subscriptions)
price.intro: If you increase or decrease the monthly subscriptions by a given percentage — what would the forecast monthly and annual revenue be vs. current, and how it helps toward the financial goal.
price.noData: Enter clients' monthly subscriptions to use the simulation.
